title: Chroma embedded mode
decision: Use ChromaDB in embedded mode, persistent at .orchid/chroma/
rationale: No extra infrastructure needed, fits homelab zero-infra principle

title: Embedding model priority
decision: llama.cpp nomic-embed-text on port 8081, sentence-transformers fallback
rationale: Keeps embeddings local and free, fallback ensures graceful degradation

title: Auto embed and recall
decision: Auto-embed session log on save, auto-recall on session load
rationale: Makes memory passive — agents benefit without explicit recall calls
